title: Webhook queue backlog after a worker deployment
summary: A RelayOps worker deployment was followed by rising queue depth and consumer errors. The record is a synthetic demonstration summary for human review.

title: Processing delay during a database migration
summary: A RelayOps migration coincided with transaction waiting and slower worker completion. The record is a synthetic demonstration summary for human review.

title: Payment API acquisition waits reduced capacity
summary: A RelayOps payment API incident showed increased connection acquisition waits and high active connection demand. The record is a synthetic demonstration summary for human review.
